endpoints.description: Sina Finance foreign-exchange quote feed. For USD/CNY tasks on finance.sina.com.cn, call exactly https://hq.sinajs.cn/etag.php?list=fx_susdcny with header Referer: https://finance.sina.com.cn/. Do not invent rn=...list URLs; the query string must contain ?list=fx_susdcny. The runtime parses hq_str_fx_* variables into quote fields including price/current, open, high, low, previous_close, change, change_pct, date, and time.
strategy_notes: Use this quote feed before slow DOM exploration on Sina forex pages; visible quote widgets often render placeholders.
For USDCNY or 美元兑人民币 tasks, symbol is fx_susdcny and the exact URL is https://hq.sinajs.cn/etag.php?list=fx_susdcny.
This endpoint exposes current rate, open, high, low, previous close, change, and quote date/time; it does not expose a one-week trend, so only use page/K-line follow-up for the trend if required.

endpoints.description: Sina Finance foreign-exchange daily K-line feed used by the official chart runtime. For USD/CNY one-week trend tasks, call https://vip.stock.finance.sina.com.cn/forex/api/jsonp.php/var%20_fx_susdcny2026_5_20=/NewForexService.getDayKLine?symbol=fx_susdcny&_=2026_5_20 with Referer: https://finance.sina.com.cn/. The runtime parses the JavaScript payload into recent daily closes and a last-seven-trading-days direction.
strategy_notes: Use this immediately after the fx_susdcny quote feed when the task asks for one-week trend or recent movement.
Do not inspect the rendered K-line chart by DOM or screenshot; this endpoint is the official data source used by the page chart.
Answer the trend from runtime fields: direction, from/to dates, firstClose, lastClose, changePct, and recentCloses.

endpoints.description: Sina Finance quote feed used by finance.sina.com.cn pages. Use browser_api_call with header Referer: https://finance.sina.com.cn/ and list=hf_XAU,SGE_AU9999 to fetch current international spot gold and Shanghai Gold Exchange Au9999 quote fields without relying on slow quote-page DOM. browser_api_call parses hq_str variables into quote objects with symbol, name, price, time, previous_close, and change_pct when available.
strategy_notes: For finance.sina.com.cn gold tasks, call the quote feed before navigating quote pages because the DOM often shows placeholder -- values or redirects.
Use hf_XAU for international spot gold in USD/oz and SGE_AU9999 for Shanghai Gold Exchange Au9999 in CNY/g.
After quotes, call https://finance.sina.com.cn/roll/c/57085.shtml for analyst outlook. Prefer compact list titles with stance over opening article pages.
Only open article pages if both the quote feed and roll list lack an analyst or market-view sentence; do not leave Sina Finance content.

endpoints.description: Sina Finance gold-analysis roll list. Use browser_api_call on this URL after the quote feed to obtain compact analyst article titles and inferred bullish/bearish/neutral stance without opening slow article tabs. The old /roll/index.d.html?cid=57085 URL only returns a JavaScript redirect, so use the canonical /roll/c/57085.shtml page.
strategy_notes: For gold outlook tasks, this list is enough when article titles contain explicit phrases such as 偏弱, 看跌, 打压, 震荡, 看涨, or 上行.
Answer from the compact list after one roll-list call. Do not click multiple article pages unless the list has no stance-bearing titles.
If the list returns several bearish and neutral titles, summarize the dominant stance instead of seeking a single definitive article.
